title: jacea razgradensis
intro: Jacea razgradensis, also known as Razgrad Daisy, is a perennial plant species in the Asteraceae family. It is a flowering plant native to Bulgaria, used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Jacea razgradensis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions, including digestive issues and skin problems.
